headline: Design Software Stocks Q4 Earnings: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) Firing on All Cylinders
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK) and its peers.
